updates.title: Summer Solstice
updates.body: A twilight gathering to honor the sun’s peak power. Join us for a flower crown workshop, meditation, and communal potluck.

updates.title: Apples are now BANNED!
updates.body: Following last week's vote, apples are now officially banned and will be removed from your inventory the next time you log in.
